---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary / 摘要

<!-- What would you like to add or improve? / 你想新增或改进什么？ -->

## Problem / 背景问题

<!-- What problem does this solve? / 这个需求解决什么问题？ -->

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

<!-- Describe your idea. / 描述你的建议方案。 -->

## Alternatives Considered / 备选方案

<!-- Any other approaches you considered? / 你是否考虑过其他方案？ -->

## Additional Context / 其他补充

<!-- Links, references, mockups, examples, etc. / 链接、参考、草图、示例等。 -->
